summary: All iteration 13 features tested and verified. Category misclassification fixed (Michael Caine, Ian McKellen, Morgan Freeman all return movie_stars). Hot Celebs ticker displays at top with photos, names, tiers, prices, and hot reasons. New celebs (Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Travis Kelce, Sydney Sweeney) appear in Hot Celebs pool. Price consistency verified between Hot Celebs and search. How It Works section has visible text (text-[10px]) under each icon. Clicking celeb in ticker triggers search.
passed_tests: Michael Caine search returns category: movie_stars (not royals)
Ian McKellen search returns category: movie_stars (not royals)
Morgan Freeman search returns category: movie_stars (not musicians)
Hot Celebs endpoint returns celebs with name, tier, price, hot_reason, image
New celebs (Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Travis Kelce, Sydney Sweeney) appear in Hot Celebs pool
Price consistency between Hot Celebs and search (within £1M tolerance)
Each hot celeb has valid hot_reason explaining why trending
Each hot celeb has valid image URL
Hot celeb tier and price within valid ranges (A: £9-12M, B: £5-8M, C: £2-4M, D: £0.5-1.5M)
Hot Celebs ticker displays at top of page with scrolling animation
Ticker items show: photo, name, tier badge, price, hot reason
How It Works section has visible text under icons (text-[10px]): Find any celeb, Tier pricing, Your budget, Transfer window, Brown Bread
Clicking celeb in Hot Celebs ticker triggers search and displays celebrity card
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 13 features verified: (1) Category detection fixed with known_actors list in detect_category_from_bio() that returns 'movie_stars' before other checks. (2) Hot Celebs pool expanded with 4 new celebs. (3) Price consistency uses default_buzz=50 for both Hot Celebs and search. (4) HotCelebsTicker component replaced TrendingTicker with scrolling animation. (5) How It Works uses text-[10px] for descriptions under icons.

price_consistency.method: default_buzz=50 used for both Hot Celebs and search
